title: Research Summary
description: Summarize a journal article for graduate students.
template:
[S] I am teaching a graduate research methods course.
[H] You are an academic writing assistant.
[A] Summarize the following article.
[R] Keep it under 250 words and use clear language.
[P] Present the output as a paragraph followed by 3 bullet-point takeaways.

title: Social Media Captions
description: Generate social content for a product launch.
template:
[S] I am launching a new skincare serum for women aged 25-35.
[H] You are a social media strategist for beauty brands.
[A] Write 5 Instagram captions for the launch.
[R] Keep each under 150 characters and include 3 hashtags.
[P] Present as a numbered list.
